The '''''Seltaya''-class fast courier''' was a type of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] built by [[Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc./Legends|Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc.]] in the last days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]].

==Characteristics==
Widely used by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], The Seltaya-class fast courier was a sleek yet durable scoutship, equipped with tail and wingtip mounted engines, and equipped with a protective laminate that could endure impressive punishment - ranging from [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] fire to several direct [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] impacts - and still manage to make it home.

Unlike many fighters of the period, the Seltaya was equipped with an internal [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]. It could be flown by a single pilot and/or an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]], and at least some models had a cockpit entered via an opening canopy. Some ships of this class also had relatively expansive on-board accommodation, including a galley, room for at least four additional passengers or crew alongside the pilot, and a crew area with a view-screen.

==History==
The [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] kept a number of these ships in the hangars at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], including the ''[[Limit of Vision]]'' which [[Jai Maruk]] used to scout the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]], and the ship which [[Palleus Chuff]] took to [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]] while impersonating [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]. Although some people questioned the quality of construction of war-built ships, with each part contracted out to the lowest bidder, the streamlined Seltayas were among the favorite ships of Chief Technician [[Boz Addle]] at the Temple.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Seltaya''-class ship which Palleus Chuff takes to Ithor early in ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' appears to be a new, single-seat military starfighter built during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. However, the real Yoda and four other Jedi return to Coruscant at the end of the novel in another vessel identified as a Seltaya, this time said to be an older ship, bought second-hand on the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]]: this ship has apparently been in civilian ownership, and seems larger, with a cockpit large enough for at least two people, a galley, and some sort of crew area equipped with a viewscreen, said to be at the opposite end of the ship from the cockpit.

It is not explained in the novel if the two ships are supposed to have precisely the same configuration, or if the variation between the two ships is a difference between military and civilian models.

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
